description.zh-Hans: 生成面向32×32和64×64 RPG素材的硬边像素树木。使用分层树冠、树干遮挡、方向光色块和可控描边，支持阔叶树、针叶树、层叠树、棕榈树和枯树。
description.en: Generates hard-edged 32×32 and 64×64 RPG tree sprites with layered canopies, trunk occlusion, clustered directional lighting, and controllable outlines.

triggers.zh-Hans: 树木, 树, 森林, 植被, 植物, 自然环境, 棕榈树, 仙人掌
triggers.en: tree, forest, flora, vegetation, plant, palm, cactus

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术树木，用于森林场景或自然环境装饰。
exampleUsage.en: Generate pixel-art trees for forest scenes or natural environment decoration.
